problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
